message:
fix: audit-driven HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and config correctness fixes

- http/h3_native: allow trailers without DATA per RFC 9114 §4.1 (MEDIUM)
- http/h3_native: cap QPACK integer shift at 56 to prevent silent truncation (LOW)
- http/h2/connection: forward MaxConcurrentStreams to StreamStore per RFC 7540 §5.1.2 (MEDIUM)
- http/h2/error: add explicit ErrorCode::InternalError arm for 0x2 (LOW)
- config: reject NaN/Infinity in repair_overhead validation (MEDIUM)
- cli/doctor: clippy fix (redundant closure to method reference)

All fixes include regression tests. Validated via rch (78 h3_native, 67 rate_limit, config tests pass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,7 @@ impl ErrorCode {
         match value {
             0x0 => Self::NoError,
             0x1 => Self::ProtocolError,
+            0x2 => Self::InternalError,
             0x3 => Self::FlowControlError,
             0x4 => Self::SettingsTimeout,
             0x5 => Self::StreamClosed,
